Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
Opt-in

The SPI is off by default. A fresh RestContext built without any @Bean TracerHook entry uses NoOpTracerHook — no tracer is reached for, no trace-context headers are parsed, no spans are opened. Consumers opt in by supplying a bridge implementation:

  • juneau-rest-server-tracing-otel ships OtelTracerHook backed by an OpenTelemetry instance — per-request span creation, OTel HTTP semantic-convention attributes, and W3C traceparent / tracestate context propagation.
  • Custom tracers (Brave, application-specific span beans, etc.) can implement TracerHook directly — the SPI intentionally has no OpenTelemetry dependency on the core surface.
Lifecycle

For every @RestOp invocation, the framework opens a Scope via startSpan(...) immediately before parameter resolution and closes it in a finally block after the handler returns or throws. Status code and exception are reported via Scope.setStatusCode(int) and Scope.setError(java.lang.Throwable) before Scope.close().

See Also:
  • TracerHook
  • Scope
  • NoOpTracerHook
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics
  • REST Server — Observability (Micrometer + OpenTelemetry)
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.otel
    OpenTelemetry bridge for the juneau-rest-server TracerHook SPI.
  • Class
    Description
    NoOpTracerHook
    Default TracerHook implementation that opens no spans and records nothing.
    NoOpTracerHook.NoOpScope
    No-op Scope returned by NoOpTracerHook.
    Scope
    Handle to one in-flight TracerHook-managed span.
    TraceContextResponseProcessor
    Writes the W3C Trace Context response headers (traceparent and, when present, tracestate) so a client calling this server can read the resulting trace identifiers back off the response.
    TracerHook
    SPI for receiving per-request tracing events from juneau-rest-server.
